title: siler zernyi subsp. laeve
intro: Siler zernyi subsp. laeve, also known as Korean angelica or Korean siler, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Siler zernyi subsp. laeve include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. Siler zernyi subsp. laeve is typically prepared as a decoction, powder, or extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
